summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Instagoogleface.com OSINT application. All core features working correctly including username scanning, platform discovery, risk scoring, paywall system, and Stripe integration.
passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (15/15 tests passed)
Platform discovery showing all 12 platforms with status indicators
Risk score circular indicator displaying correctly (0-100 scale)
Paywall overlay appears for unpaid scans with €4.99 unlock button
Search results show 'API key required' message when SerpAPI not configured
Stripe checkout creation endpoint works and redirects properly
Google login button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Landing page loads with all required components
Username input validation and error handling
Platform filter dropdown with all options
Scanning animation and results page navigation
Dark cybersecurity theme with cyan accents
